gistemp-zonal-lines.alt_text: Line chart of centered five-year temperature anomalies from 1882 to 2023 for the northern extratropics, tropics, and southern extratropics. All three series rise above the dashed zero-anomaly line in recent decades, with the northern extratropics ending highest.

world-bank-urbanization-bars.alt_text: Horizontal bars show the urban share of population in seven World Bank regions in ascending supplied order. Values range from 35.5% in South Asia to 81.3% in Latin America and the Caribbean, and every bar is directly labeled.

palmer-penguins-box.alt_text: Box plots compare body mass for Adelie, Chinstrap, and Gentoo penguins, with all 342 observations overlaid as jittered points. Gentoo penguins have a visibly higher median and distribution than the other two species.

wine-correlation-heatmap.alt_text: A complete 12-by-12 heatmap shows Pearson correlations among red-wine physicochemical variables and quality on a common scale from blue at negative one through white at zero to red at positive one. The diagonal is positive one, while off-diagonal cells include strong positive and negative relationships.

auto-mpg-scatter.alt_text: Scatter plot of fuel economy against vehicle weight for all 398 Auto MPG vehicles, grouped by origin using both colour and marker shape. Heavier vehicles occupy the lower-fuel-economy portion of the plot, while European and Japanese vehicles cluster toward lighter weights.

usgs-earthquake-histogram.alt_text: Histogram of 2,128 reviewed earthquakes in 2025 using 0.1-magnitude bins beginning at magnitude 5.0 and extending through the observed maximum of 8.8. Bar heights show percentage of all events and fall sharply as magnitude increases.
